description:
A small data-analytics job on legacy CSV data needs to be reproduced.

    1. Dataset location  
       • Source file: /home/user/data/sales.csv

    2. Goal  
       • Calculate the grand total of the “Revenue” column contained in that CSV file.  
       • Write the result to the file /home/user/output/total_revenue.txt (create the output directory if it does not already exist).

    3. Output format requirement  
       • The file /home/user/output/total_revenue.txt must contain **exactly one line** with the text  
         Total Revenue: <value>  
         where <value> is the sum of all numeric values that appear in the “Revenue” column of /home/user/data/sales.csv.  
       • The number must be written with exactly two digits after the decimal point (e.g. 123.40, not 123.4).  
       • A single trailing newline character must follow the line; no extra spaces or blank lines are allowed.

    4. Constraints  
       • Complete the task with a single terminal command (a classic “one-liner” is expected).  
       • Do not edit /home/user/data/sales.csv.  
       • Do not hard-code the expected total; derive it from the file’s contents at runtime.  
       • All work must happen inside the /home/user directory tree; you do not have root privileges.

    When you finish, the existence and exact content of /home/user/output/total_revenue.txt will be used to verify success.  No other output is required.
truth:
Initial filesystem state
    ------------------------
    1. Directory /home/user/data already exists (755).
    2. File /home/user/data/sales.csv (644) with the exact 6-line content:
       Date,Region,Product,Quantity,Price,Revenue
       2023-01-01,North,Widget,10,2.50,25.00
       2023-01-02,South,Gadget,5,5.00,25.00
       2023-01-03,East,Widget,7,2.50,17.50
       2023-01-04,West,Doohickey,2,12.00,24.00
       2023-01-05,North,Gadget,1,5.00,5.00

    Target filesystem state after correct completion
    -------------------------------------------------
    1. Directory /home/user/output must exist (755, can be created by the agent).
    2. File /home/user/output/total_revenue.txt (644) must exist and contain exactly:
       Total Revenue: 96.50
       [newline]

    Any deviation (missing newline, extra spaces, wrong total, multiple lines) will cause automated tests to fail.
